Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I take it you've defeated Jin. You are quite a troublesome bunch.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Even in these final moments, you still insist on fighting?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Why struggle against the inevitable end?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 2 25 25}Nothing's gonna end... Not if we have anything to say about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Why not celebrate this wonderful moment, instead?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm not opposed to seeing this world off in your company.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Will you shut up already!? We're not letting that happen, got it!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}My life was stolen from me... And in its place, I was given a power I never asked for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}And so, I learned that the future is only a delusion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Only by striving to live every moment to its fullest can the soul truly be satisfied.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That is why we welcome this glorious revelation, to shine a light upon this darkened world![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 2 25 25}I'm not dying so you can have a frickin' night-light![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Many of my disciples have gathered to rejoice in her arrival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 2 25 25}That's just because Nyx is causing all these strange incidents![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm afraid you have that backwards. Consider for a moment...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Who is responsible for reviving Nyx? Can a single person boast of this great accomplishment?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You all worked tirelessly to prevent it, and yet instead, you unwittingly aided in her coming...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So you see, this is not just my will; it is the will of all people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}People cannot face death without first finding meaning in life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But the world has realized that any meaning in it was lost long ago...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Nyx has come because humanity has cried out for her salvation![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 2 25 25}I-I don't believe you! Who would ever wish for Nyx to come!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}Wandering without purpose, living an empty life, dying an empty death... passing your days without suffering...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I don't know if this can be called right or wrong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}But personally, I wouldn't want to live that way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}I want a purpose, and to have others I care about... That's why I came all this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}We're not alone. On our own, we may be helpless, but together, we can achieve the impossible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}This is what you lack. That's why you see the Fall as salvation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}In choosing solitude over bonds with others, you limit your own power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So a Kirijo, responsible for robbing us of our future, would dare to speak of our limits? How laughable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Then again, I should have known better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}This is just the kind of bigotry I would expect from the ones who labeled me a failure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}If you recall, {f 4 1}, I told you that if you dared to oppose me, I would show no mercy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}If you intend to deny the future I have envisioned...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Very well then... If you insist on proving your superiority, I shall do the same![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Either way, your efforts are in vain... Nyx's arrival is but moments away![n]{f 1 1}
